message:
fix(config): implement field-level merge for MarkdownSettings instead of wholesale override

Previously, merging two Config objects would use `other.markdown.or
(base.markdown)`, which meant that if the override config provided ANY
MarkdownSettings at all, it would completely replace the base settings
— even for fields the override didn't explicitly set. This is
inconsistent with how other settings sections (retry, terminal, images)
are merged, where individual fields within the section are merged
independently.

Adds merge_markdown() following the same pattern as merge_retry(),
merge_terminal(), etc.: when both base and other provide
MarkdownSettings, each field (currently just code_block_indent) falls
through to the base value if the override doesn't specify it. This
ensures that a project-level config setting `markdown.code_block_indent`
won't accidentally clear other markdown fields that may be added in
the future, and that global defaults are properly inherited.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
